profile.name: Sabir Jan
profile.title: AI/ML Researcher & Creative Technologist
profile.bio: Blends deep learning, Wi-Fi CSI emotion recognition, and cultural dance choreography for human-centered AI. Computer Engineering graduate from COMSATS, focusing on privacy-first affective computing.

projects.title: EmotiFi: Wi-Fi CSI Emotion Recognition
projects.subtitle: Final Year Research Project
projects.description: Contactless emotion recognition using ESP32 Wi-Fi CSI. Implemented ResNet-18 and EfficientNetV2B0 with 85%+ accuracy.
projects.longDescription: EmotiFi is a cutting-edge research project that leverages Wi-Fi Channel State Information (CSI) to detect human emotions without wearable sensors. By analyzing the distortions in Wi-Fi signals caused by human presence and movement, the system extracts unique biometric signatures. We implemented deep learning models including ResNet-18 and EfficientNetV2B0 to classify emotions into categories like Joy, Stress, and Neutral. The project emphasizes privacy-first affective computing, ensuring that emotional data can be captured without the need for intrusive cameras or microphones.

projects.title: DanReality: Heritage Dance AI
projects.subtitle: Creative Tech // Cultural Arts
projects.description: Fusion of Gilgit-Baltistan heritage dance and AI for mental wellness, involving real-time gesture feedback and affective synchronization.
projects.longDescription: DanReality (also known as JanBroz) is an experimental research project. JanBroz is the dedicated creative technology and artist channel of Sabir and his twin brother, featuring immersive performance videos and AI integrations. The project uses computer vision (MediaPipe) to track traditional dance movements in real-time, providing feedback on posture, rhythm, and emotional expression. It features immersive backgrounds that react to the dancer's intensity and mood, exploring therapeutic interventions through cultural arts.

projects.title: Aurora AI Assistant
projects.subtitle: RAG Chatbot // Research
projects.description: Knowledge-enhanced mental health chatbot using ChromaDB and Gemini API. Implements crisis-safe response logic.
projects.longDescription: Aurora is a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system designed for mental health support and research analysis. Built with LangChain and the Gemini API, it retrieves information from a curated database of clinical research (ChromaDB) to provide multi-perspective, evidence-based answers. The assistant features an agentic orchestration layer that can switch between general support, research analysis, and emergency crisis detection.

projects.title: Line Following Robot
projects.subtitle: Embedded Systems // PID Control
projects.description: Autonomous robot utilizing infra-red sensors and PID control for high-speed line tracking and obstacle avoidance.
projects.longDescription: A robust embedded systems project featuring a line-following robot capable of navigating complex tracks with variable speeds. Implemented using Arduino/C++, featuring real-time sensor calibration and optimized control loops (PID).

details: Developed AI solutions using Python, LangChain, and LangGraph.
Implemented RAG-based systems for knowledge retrieval.
Optimized ML models for production deployment.
Conducted research on computer vision models for human pose estimation.
Assisted in gathering datasets for emotion recognition research.
Verified model performance against benchmark datasets.

education.details: Major in AI & ML. Recipient of EHSAAS Undergraduate Scholarship. CGPA 3.4/4.0.
Grade A-1 (921/1100). Concentrated in Advanced Mathematics and Physics.
